widgets.title: Backstory
widgets.content: Raised in a hidden Helite commune, Natalia left home to see the world before taking on the responsibilities of a High Priestess. What was supposed to be a simple journey turned into years of adventure, loss, and self-discovery. After dying and being brought back in a new body, she found herself carrying new responsibilities, old secrets, and a deeper understanding of the forces that shape life and death.

players.name: Gloom
players.title: The Unimpressed

widgets.content: Gloom has spent the last twenty years working alone after learning the hard way that people distrust and dislike drow. She recently, against her better judgement, took up with the party in the hopes of preventing the end of the world, and she doesn't *always* regret it.

player-1780375454934.author: Moira Harrow
player-1780375454934.text: What are you doing on this application? You know its not safe to publicly expose yourself like this!

player-1780464746882.author: Seraphina
player-1780464746882.text: You will never find me! That carpet is mine forever! Ahahahaha!

player-1780655036525.text: Say hi to Fiix for me.

0-9.author: admin
0-9.text: Our party is brought together for the first time in four years.

npcs.name: Nessus
npcs.title: The Newborn
npcs.bio: Used to be a Drow working in acquisitions for the unseen, but has been born anew.

npcs.name: Nik
npcs.title: Hunter Bodyguard
npcs.bio: Grew up in the fields south of Avernus, made a name for himself as a hunter at the games as was aquired by The Order of Blue Fire. He is currently under contract in Megara to protect Lady Stonefield.

npcs.name: Seraphina
npcs.title: The Witch Fanatic
npcs.bio: Seraphina is a criminal on the run. She is said to terrorized Avernus and the Mount Dindymon Outpost for many years. She has been listed as stealing a pricelss artifact, a flying carpet. There is a bounty for her capture and return of this artifact.

npcs.name: Selene Harker
npcs.title: Priorietor of the Obsidian Estate
npcs.bio: Practically runs Megara after her father mysteriously vanished. She has connections with many wealthy business owners and is said to have ties with some illegal operations.

npcs.name: Moira Harrow
npcs.title: High Priestess of the Harrow Commune
npcs.bio: Not much is known publicly about Moira.

npcs.name: Alphonse Harrow
npcs.title: The Ghost Scholar
npcs.bio: Alphonse is now a resident ghost within the Harrow Commune. He can be found reading and writing books in his study or giving advice to members of the commune.

npcs.name: Alara Stonefield
npcs.title: The Foolish Idealist
npcs.bio: Young, shy, and academically inclined woman in her early 20s, belonging to the influential Stonefield family, which has deep ties to the Arcadian mining industry. Despite her youth, Alara has been thrust into the political landscape of [[Megara]], where she has been appointed as a city council member, largely due to her familyΓÇÖs status. AlaraΓÇÖs upbringing in a wealthy and well-connected family has given her a strong sense of responsibility, though she often finds herself overwhelmed by the complexities of political life. Her approach to governance is heavily influenced by her ideals and her desire to make a positive impact on the city.

npcs.name: Aifira Harker
npcs.bio: Daughter and heir to the Obsidian Manor in Megara.

objectives: Go back with Jaak to his home near Atla. Make plans to return another time and help Jaak's friend Nic and assist with research.
Return to commune, discuss events, what happened at Hel's temple with family.
Priestess duties, gathering supplies to leave commune for extended time.

events.name: Candle Rites
events.memory: She's not comfortable in her new body. She would attened the monthly candle rites, but would need time/encouragement for the group activities.

events.name: Holiday of Revelry
events.memory: Nat helps bring forth Wishbone with Moira during the fall festival. :)
